chatDisclaimer: Conversation is stored locally in your browser.
contextBoth: Code & Console context will be sent.
clearConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear the conversation history?
thinkingNotSummarized: Conversation was short enough — no summarisation needed.
slotSelectorTitle: Select program slot to save to
aboutSubtitle: An AI-powered environment for working with LEGO® SPIKE™ Prime robots using SkoleGPT.
bugReportPrefix: Send bug reports and feature requests to
noLogs: No logs yet. Console output will appear here.
cannotSaveToSlot: Cannot save to slot. Please connect to a SPIKE hub first.
switchHardwareConfirm: Switching hardware will clear your chat history. Continue?
flashMicrobitConfirm: MicroPython is not installed on this micro:bit. Install firmware now?
cannotSaveToMainPy: Cannot save. Please connect to a micro:bit first.
flashComplete: MicroPython installed successfully! Click Connect to use your micro:bit.
hardwarePickerSubtitle: Pick the board you want to program. You can change this later.
legoPythonReady: Python ready. Connect devices and press Run.
legoRenameError: That name is already in use
legoWrongTypeError: That device is "{actual}", not a {expected}. Please pick again.
flashHint: Keep the micro:bit plugged in. This can take up to a minute.
noActiveSession: No active session. Please select or create a session first.
noModelAvailable: No AI model is available right now. Please try again in a moment.
chatDisclaimerCloud: All activity is stored and may be reviewed by course staff.
llmUsageTooltip: Using Large Language Models (LLMs) requires power and water. Different models use power and water at different rates. To ensure everyone is using these resources respectfully, there is a daily usage limit for higher-usage models.
budgetMessagePremium: Every message sent to a Large Language Model (LLM) uses power and water. To ensure everyone is using these resources respectfully, there is a daily usage limit for premium models.
budgetUseNonPremiumPlural: Please use one of these non-premium models:
budgetResetPremium: You can use premium models again at midnight Eastern Time.
budgetMessageGeneral: Every message sent to a Large Language Model (LLM) uses power and water. To ensure everyone is using these resources respectfully, there is a daily usage limit.
budgetResetGeneral: You can use LLMs again at midnight Eastern Time.
deviceConnectedRepl: Device Status: Connected. REPL is ready.
disconnectingPlatformChanged: Disconnecting previous device — session platform changed.
disconnectingSwitchingTo: Disconnecting — switching to {label} session. Click Connect to install driver.
waitingMicrobitSelection: Waiting for micro:bit serial device selection...
waitingPicoSelection: Waiting for Pico serial device selection...
waitingEsp32Selection: Waiting for ESP32 serial device selection...
errWebUsbRequired: Connection failed: WebUSB is required to install micro:bit MicroPython. Use a Chromium-based browser.
errNoMicrobitSelected: Connection failed: no micro:bit selected in the browser device picker.
errUnstableWebUsb: Connection failed: unstable WebUSB link to micro:bit. Unplug/replug the board, then click Connect micro:bit again.
errNotMicroPythonRepl: Connection failed: selected device is not a compatible MicroPython REPL.
errSerialPortBusy: Connection failed: serial port is busy. Close any other serial connections to the device and try again.
errNoDeviceSelected: Connection failed: no device selected by the user.
errMicrobitNotReappear: micro:bit did not reappear after flashing. Unplug/replug the board, then click Connect again.
errInstallDriverMicrobit: Failed to install {label} on micro:bit — try reconnecting.
errInstallDriverDevice: Failed to install {label} on device — try reconnecting.
cannotSaveToMainPyDevice: Cannot save to main.py. Please connect to a device first.
cannotClearMainPy: Cannot clear main.py. Please connect to the ESP32 first.
failedToClearMainPy: Failed to clear main.py from ESP32:
cannotClearDownload: Cannot clear download. Please connect to the micro:bit first.
failedToClearDownload: Failed to clear download from micro:bit:
cannotDownload: Cannot download. Please connect to the micro:bit first.
newSessionDescription: Name your session and pick the hardware platform you will be using.
assignPlatformDescription: This session was created before hardware platforms existed. Pick a platform to continue.
aboutAppSubtitle: An AI-powered environment for working with LilyBot robots.
authHaveAccount: Already have an account? Sign In
